appraisal_events.evidence: « ... c'est le salon de Mme de Villeparisis, où fréquentait la reine de Suède, ... qui sera considéré comme un des plus brillants du XIXe siècle » ; ses conversations « ont fourni aux “Souvenirs” ... de ces morceaux excellents » ; Norpois « lui amenait ... les hommes d'État ».
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator elevates Mme de Villeparisis by asserting that posterity will regard her salon as one of the century’s most brilliant, supported by high-prestige associations and by the literary capital of her Mémoires.

status_effects.explanation: Her standing is strongly raised through narrator-endorsed claims of eminent visitors and lasting reputational brilliance ensured by her writings.
